case_title: KATHRYN ANN CASTRO VS. CHIU PAO

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, KATHRYN ANN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-22-2003 AT 1:30PM. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2003 Continued To Sep-22-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/22/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Mary Hinds. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-21-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
